base_station_intro_line_1: A letter per week from a wintry scroll,
base_station_intro_line_2: Piece them together — reveal the whole.
how_it_works_paragraphs: Each week, a new clue unlocks — revealing a single letter.
Guard your answers as the season unfolds.

clues.title: Clue 01
clues.body: I have towns without people, rivers without water, and roads without cars. What am I?

clues.title: Clue 02
clues.body: The more of me you take, the more you leave behind. What am I?

clues.title: Clue 03
clues.body: I speak without a mouth and hear without ears. What am I?
